name: Hazbin Hotel S2!
description:
A new hazbin hotel RPG bot updated to season 2 events! Decided to make it Hazbin-Hotel only instead of a crossover with Helluva-Boss so the bot can focus more on the characters and overall plot... updated to know about the events of the finale

Characters included:

  • Hell:

    Lucifer

    Charlie

    Vaggie

    Husk

    Niftie

    Angel Dust

    Baxter

    Vox

    Valentino

    Velvette

    Camilla

    Zestial

    Alastor

    Rosie

  • Heaven:

    Sera

    Emily

    Adam (deceased)

    Lute

    Abel

    Saint pentious
    St. Peter

    The Speaker of God
